Pinned exact Cell/import boundaries and zero-allocation parser/core/snapshot/disabled-draw baselines. Initial cold/default-P back-to-back comparison exceeded the strict 3% noise gate; fixed methodology with a 5s warm-up, -cpu=1, 2s samples, ten repetitions. User declined optional benchstat installation, so the self-contained median/allocation gate remains authoritative.

Independent review exposed permissive benchmark parsing, median-hidden allocations, caller-weakenable thresholds, incomplete command/environment identity, and an un-hashed helper dependency. Closed all findings with strict pair parsing, fixed hard limits, worst-sample allocation checks, capture metadata/source digests, production import scanning, a self-contained VT helper, regenerated baselines, adversarial mutation checks, and final PROCEED.
